content.full_text:
TO: [x] JEANNE   [ ] JAY
      [ ] LYNN    [ ] BARBARA
      [ ] RICH    [ ] BOB S.
      [ ] HELEN   [x] OTHER_Mary Ann

FROM: Carla Wardlow
DATE: 12/30/83

[x] TELEPHONE ADVICE - SEE BELOW
[ ] CORRESPONDENCE ADVICE - SEE ATTACHED DRAFT
(If you have any comments, notify advisor within 1 day)

FILE LOCATION: 84200

INCLUDE IN ADVICE PACKAGE: YES [ ] NO [x]

CALLER: Barbara Meyers
REPRESENTING: County of Riverside
PHONE NUMBER:

QUESTION: Does a candidate-controlled committee primarily formed to oppose the qualification of a recall file a semi-annual statement for 1983 or a qualification statement 35 days after qualification?

ANSWER: A committee primarily formed to oppose the qualification of a recall which is controlled by a candidate files as a qualification committee (35 days after qualification), not on the candidate's filing schedule.
